allowedArgs: y=$(/bin/date +%Y); mm=$(/bin/date +%m); mnum=$(/bin/date +%-m); today=$(/bin/date +%-d); first=$(/bin/date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "$y-$mm-01" +%w); [ -z "$first" ] && first=0; dim=$(/usr/bin/cal $mnum $y | /usr/bin/awk 'NF>0{d=$NF} END{print d}'); [ -z "$dim" ] && dim=30; cells=""; i=0; while [ $i -lt $first ]; do cells="$cells"0,; i=$((i+1)); done; d=1; while [ $d -le $dim ]; do cells="$cells$d,"; d=$((d+1)); done; cells=$(printf '%s' "$cells" | /usr/bin/sed 's/,$//'); echo '{"today":'$today',"month":"'$(/bin/date +%B)'","cells":['$cells']}'
